summary: Phase E System Hardening: Full E2E Regression Testing COMPLETE. All 23 backend API tests PASSED. Frontend Trial Balance bug FIXED. Sales, AP, AR pages working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: TrialBalance.jsx: FIXED - Changed to handle both 'accounts' and 'items' API response formats
TrialBalance.jsx: Updated API endpoint to use /api/accounting/financial/trial-balance
Export endpoints: All working correctly - products, customers, suppliers, branches
Template downloads: All working - products, customers, suppliers
Branch creation: Working with code field
Tenant delete: Warning with transaction counts returns correctly when confirm_delete=false
AP/AR list: Working correctly with /api/ap/list and /api/ar/list endpoints
Financial reports: Trial Balance and Balance Sheet APIs return valid data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase E testing complete. TrialBalance.jsx bug was fixed - API response format mismatch (accounts vs items). All backend APIs working. Sales, AP, AR, Trial Balance, Balance Sheet all verified.

branch_creation.POST /api/branches: PASS - Creates branch with code field

tenant_delete_warning.DELETE /api/tenant/{id}?confirm_delete=f: PASS - Returns warning with transaction counts

bug_fixed.issue: TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'reduce')
bug_fixed.root_cause: API response format mismatch - backend returns 'accounts' array and 'totals' object, but frontend expected 'items' array and 'total_debit'/'total_credit' fields
bug_fixed.fix_applied: Added compatibility for both old and new API response formats, updated API endpoint to /api/accounting/financial/trial-balance
